title: The Sufi Message of Hazrat Inayat Khan: The Vision of God and Man, Confessions, Four Plays
author: Hazrat Inayat Khan
description: The first part of this twelfth volume of The Sufi Message of Hazrat Inayat Khan consist of a number of lectures the Master gave at different times, and which for various reasons have not been included in the proceeding volumes.
